parameters.values: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: 'telegram', sender_id: String($json.message.from.id), sender_name: ($json.message.from.first_name || '') + ' ' + ($json.message.from.last_name || ''), body: $json.message.text || '[media]', raw_metadata: JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.message.chat.id, message_id: $json.message.message_id, date: $json.message.date }), status: 'unread' }) }}

_meta.description: bOS v0.6.0 — Receives Telegram messages and saves them to the unified inbox (Supabase messages table). Replace credentials before activating.
setup_steps: 2. Add Telegram Bot credentials in n8n
